title: waltheria bahamensis
intro: Waltheria bahamensis, also known as Bahama buttonwood or Bahama buttonbush, is a plant species native to the Bahamas, belonging to the family Malvaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Waltheria bahamensis include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, often combining it with other plants to enhance its medicinal properties.
